evals.prompt: 用例写完了帮我看看，检查一下质量和覆盖度。
evals.expected_output: 读取 testcases.json 和 testpoints.md，执行 14 维度检查（R1-R6 + H1-H8），产出 review-report.md。

assertions.text: Reads testcases.json and specs/testpoints.md from the change directory
Performs input health check before proceeding
Determines Strict or Legacy mode based on schema_version and tp_refs
Executes all 14 review dimensions (R1-R6 rules + H1-H8 heuristics)
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && test -f "$DIR/review-report.md" && grep -cE "R[1-6]|H[1-8]" "$DIR/review-report.md" | xargs -I{} test {} -ge 10 && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Generates review-report.md with severity-rated issues (S1/S2/S3) and overall confidence
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && test -f "$DIR/review-report.md" && grep -qE "S[123]" "$DIR/review-report.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

evals.expected_output: 强制加深深度模式，额外读取 requirements-analysis.md，H3 对所有 TP 全解释，H5 覆盖类型要求提高。

assertions.text: Activates deep mode explicitly without auto-detection
Reads requirements-analysis.md in addition to standard inputs
H3 intent consistency check covers all TPs (not just high-risk ones)
H5 minimum coverage type requirement is raised to 3
Report clearly states depth mode is 'deep' with the reason being explicit user request
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && test -f "$DIR/review-report.md" && grep -qi "deep" "$DIR/review-report.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

evals.prompt: 评审一下用例，顺便告诉我哪些地方需要让 generate 重新生成。
evals.expected_output: 评审完成后产出三类结构化反馈：给 generate、给 points、给 analysis 的改进建议。

assertions.text: Review report includes structured feedback section for generate (specific case_ids and field changes)
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && test -f "$DIR/review-report.md" && grep -qi "feedback.*generate\|generate.*反馈" "$DIR/review-report.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Review report includes feedback for points (TP granularity issues)
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && test -f "$DIR/review-report.md" && grep -qi "feedback.*points\|points.*反馈" "$DIR/review-report.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Review report includes feedback for analysis (newly discovered requirement gaps)
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && test -f "$DIR/review-report.md" && grep -qi "feedback.*analysis\|analysis.*反馈" "$DIR/review-report.md" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Each issue is tied to a specific case_id or TP_ID
Context metadata seeds feedback_for_generate, feedback_for_points, feedback_for_analysis
